name: Mind Math
description: Math Sprint is a fast-paced arithmetic game that challenges your speed, accuracy, and focus. Solve math problems before time runs out, level up, earn high scores, and achieve top grades. Whether you’re a casual player or a math master, Math Sprint keeps your brain active and engaged! Each level gives you 4 math questions with a limited time to answer. The faster and more accurate you are, the higher your score and grade. Progress through increasing difficulty, unlock new modes.
instructions: Left Mouse Button ndash Select Choose Number
